Our Products

Premium Cleaning Solutions

High-quality products crafted for spotless results, every time.

Best Seller

Toilet Cleaner

500ml

PronoClean Toilet Cleaner ek powerful formula hai jo toilet ki deewar se lekar nali tak ki saari gandagi, daag aur bacteria ko ek hi baar mein saaf kar deta hai. Iska strong yet safe formula aapke bathroom ko fresh aur gleaming rakhta hai.

  • ✓ Powerful antibacterial formula
  • ✓ Removes tough stains instantly
  • ✓ Fresh fragrance, long-lasting
  • ✓ Safe for all toilet surfaces

About Us

Hardoi ki Apni Brand

PronoClean ek local cleaning products brand hai jo Bane Kuian, Beniganj, Hardoi mein banaya gaya hai. Hamara mission hai ki har ghar mein ek affordable aur high-quality cleaning product ho jo logo ki zindagi ko aasaan bana sake.

Hum believe karte hain ki local brands bhi global quality de sakti hain. PronoClean is baat ka sabut hai.

🌿
Local Manufacturing
Hardoi mein banaya gaya, Hardoi ke liye
⚡
Powerful Formula
Ek hi baar mein results
💰
Affordable Prices
Best quality, best price
Founder & CEO

Shaurya Shukla

Founder & CEO, PronoClean

Ek young entrepreneur hain jo apne sapne ko saakaar karte hue PronoClean ko launch kiya. Unka vision hai ki har ghar mein ek trusted aur affordable cleaning brand ho — jo local ho, par quality mein global ho.
